title: TICKERON crypto on Solana
author: JomaFinance
selftext:
Tickeron has announced the launch of its token. This strategic move aims to broaden Tickeron’s audience within the crypto community, fostering greater engagement with traders and enthusiasts alike.

The token is now live with the contract address: HUWzPAUYLgAMWbP8MiQctEUDjqgp5dzQDVw61xpA1Xdc.

Fot details:  
  
1) Fixed maximum supply: 1.0B Tickeron

2) Decent top-10 holders & no developer sales

3) Long-term

I have been using Tickeron trading AI Agnets for months. Looking forward for futher developments and possible listings on CEXs.
